{"ignition":{"version":"3.4.0"},"storage":{"directories":[{"path":"/var/data","mode":493}],"files":[{"path":"/etc/hostname","mode":420,"overwrite":true,"contents":{"source":"data:,{{HOSTNAME_ENCODED}}"}},{"path":"/etc/containers/registries.conf.d/registry-gt-lo.conf","mode":420,"contents":{"source":"data:,%5B%5Bregistry%5D%5D%0Alocation%20%3D%20%22registry.gt.lo%3A5000%22%0Ainsecure%20%3D%20true%0A"}},{"path":"/etc/modules-load.d/fuse.conf","mode":420,"contents":{"source":"data:,fuse%0A"}}]},"systemd":{"units":[{"name":"NetworkManager-wait-online.service","mask":true},{"name":"podman.socket","enabled":true},{"name":"mkube-agent.service","enabled":true,"contents":"[Unit]
Description=mkube job agent (container)
After=network-online.target podman.socket
Wants=network-online.target
Requires=podman.socket

[Service]
Type=simple
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
ExecStartPre=/bin/bash -c 'echo Waiting for DNS...; for i in $(seq 1 60); do getent hosts registry.gt.lo && exit 0; sleep 2; done; echo DNS timeout; exit 1'
ExecStartPre=-/usr/bin/podman rm -f mkube-agent
ExecStartPre=/usr/bin/mkdir -p /var/data/agent-storage /var/data/tmp
ExecStart=/usr/bin/podman run --name mkube-agent --rm --network host --privileged -v /var/data:/data -v /var/data/agent-storage:/var/lib/containers -v /var/data/tmp:/var/tmp -v /run/podman/podman.sock:/run/podman/podman.sock -e TMPDIR=/data/tmp -e MKUBE_API=http://192.168.200.2:8082 -e CONTAINER_HOST=unix:///run/podman/podman.sock --pull=always --arch amd64 registry.gt.lo:5000/mkube-agent:edge
ExecStop=/usr/bin/podman stop mkube-agent
TimeoutStartSec=900
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
"}]}}

units.name: coreos-installer.service
units.contents:
[Unit]
Description=Install Fedora CoreOS to disk
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target
RequiresMountsFor=/etc/install.ign

[Service]
Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/usr/bin/coreos-installer install /dev/sda --ignition-file /etc/install.ign --copy-network
ExecStartPost=/usr/bin/systemctl reboot
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
